name: aggregator skips file lacking required source: header (warning to stderr) but aggregates others
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>err.txt | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);const fs=require("fs");const stderr=fs.readFileSync("err.txt","utf8");const ids=r.rules.map(x=>x.id);if(ids.length===1&&ids[0]==="good-rule"&&stderr.includes("no-source.yaml")&&stderr.includes("source")){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: ids="+JSON.stringify(ids)+", stderr="+JSON.stringify(stderr)+"\n");process.exit(1)}});'
setup:
cat > tree/google/good.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-10T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: good-rule
    name: good
    description: good.
    detector: rubric/detectors/g.sh
recommended_set: [good-rule]
all_set: [good-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/google/no-source.yaml << 'EOF'
# This file has rules but no source: header. Should be skipped with warning.
rules:
  - id: orphan-rule
    name: orphan
    description: rule without source header.
    detector: rubric/detectors/orphan.sh
recommended_set: [orphan-rule]
all_set: [orphan-rule]
EOF
